claim: The feature requires leverage-first ranking with honest degradation rationale output and shared downstream inheritance
implication: A shared ranking contract is mandatory rather than optional

claim: The plan explicitly rejects local policy drift and direct dependence on 008 and 009
implication: Implementation should create extension points without state or memory coupling

claim: Daily briefing weekly digest and reorg each embed their own policy language
implication: Current recommendation behavior is split across separate prompt paths

claim: Gemini fallback normalization infers priority and project from task keywords
implication: Current deterministic policy is heuristic-based and not reusable as a standalone domain service

claim: Command execution performs a second policy sweep with separate inferPriority and inferProject helpers
implication: There is active duplication between model fallback logic and command repair logic

claim: User context already carries ordered goals and behavioral notes
implication: The product already has an explicit source for user-owned meaning even if it is not structured yet

claim: Sensitive task content is preserved during updates
implication: Ranking and rationale should avoid requiring content rewrites and should preserve privacy boundaries

claim: Briefing and weekly must inherit shared foundation policy
implication: 007 must expose a reusable policy surface for summaries

claim: Urgent mode and state precedence belong to feature 008
implication: 007 should accept modifiers but not own the resolver

claim: Behavioral reflection must remain observational and privacy-bounded
implication: 007 should not store or infer long-term behavior as part of ranking
